Metadata.title: International Shopping Platform
Metadata.description: Cross-border ecommerce app shell with BFF and contract-first architecture.

HomePage.title: App shell and user-domain access layer are ready.
HomePage.description: The repository now exposes user-domain BFF routes and feature access methods. Business UI pages will be delivered in later phases.

unauthorized.title: Login is required
unauthorized.description: Your session is missing or expired. Sign in and retry.

csrf.title: Security validation failed
csrf.description: CSRF validation failed. Refresh and submit again.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.description: Request frequency is limited. Please retry later.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: Upstream service failed. Retry and report the trace ID if it persists.

unknown.title: Request failed
unknown.description: The request failed unexpectedly. Retry or contact support with trace ID.

LoginPage.title: Login UI is not implemented yet
LoginPage.description: Only the user-domain BFF routes and feature access layer are implemented for now. This route is reserved for the future login page.
